description: a gem with more than a handful of dependencies — not necessarily bad if each dep is well-justified
input:
# Gemfile (production)
gem 'rails',            '~> 7.2'
gem 'pg',               '~> 1.5'
gem 'puma',             '~> 6.0'
gem 'redis',            '~> 5.0'
gem 'kamal',            require: false
gem 'image_processing', '~> 1.2'
gem 'aws-sdk-s3',       require: false
